headline: Canadian defined benefit pension plans show increased funded levels in Q2: Aon
summary: Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, announced today that the aggregate funded ratio for Canadian pension plans in the S&P/TSX Composite Index increased to 116.7 percent compared to 111.4 percent at the end of last quarter, according to the Aon Pension Risk Tracker.
